title: Samui Water Park
shortDesc: Thrilling slides, lazy rivers, and splash zones — a full day of water fun for the whole family.
description: Samui Water Park is the island's top water attraction, featuring high-speed slides, a lazy river, wave pool, and dedicated toddler splash zones. The park has shaded seating, locker rooms, food stalls, and lifeguards on duty. A full-day activity that kids absolutely love.
